label: Solar Push
info: Fetches the full Signal K vessels/self tree every 30 s and POSTs all available data to a remote PHP endpoint. Also writes to InfluxDB v2 in line protocol.

label: Venus Reboot
info: Scheduled and manual reboot of Venus OS via Victron D-Bus. Device-agnostic MPPT restart via MQTT. Portal ID and device instances are discovered at startup.

name: Parse everything
Format InfluxDB line protocol
DEVICE-AGNOSTIC: No hardcoded IDs. Portal ID and device instances are discovered at startup via MQTT. Deploy this flow identically to any Venus OS device.
Parse portal ID
Build keepalive
Store charger instance
Request device list
Store battery instance
Build MPPT OFF command
Build MPPT ON command
HTTP response payload
func:
msg.payload = { status: 'restarting', chargers: flow.get('chargers') };
return msg;
